zotero._comment_library_id: Find this at zotero.org/settings/keys — shown as 'Your userID for use in API calls'
zotero._comment_api_key: Generate at zotero.org/settings/keys → Create new private key
zotero._comment_library_type: 'user' for personal library, 'group' for group library
zotero._comment_collection_key: Optional. The 8-char key from a Zotero collection URL. Leave empty to save to root.

notion._comment_token: Create an Integration at notion.so/my-integrations → copy 'Internal Integration Token'
notion._comment_database_id: Open your Notion database → copy the ID from the URL (32-char hex string)
